title: Executive Summary Report
desc: One-page C-suite overview consolidating key metrics from Sales, Operations and HR.
longDesc: A single-page board-level dashboard aggregating the top 12 KPIs across four business functions. Designed for weekly leadership reviews — auto-updates each Monday via scheduled refresh.

title: HBC Dashboard
desc: Key operational indicators and performance tracking across facilities.
longDesc: A Power BI report providing an overview of core metrics and KPIs relevant to health facility operations, enabling stakeholders to monitor performance at a glance.

title: HTTSW Overview Dashboard
desc: Deeper drill-down into operational and program metrics across health and child welfare programs.
longDesc: A detailed Power BI report offering a breakdown of program-level data, trends, and supporting metrics to complement the executive overview, designed for operational decision-making.

title: Tch Study
desc: Youth empowerment research dashboard — tracking school visits, survey completions, and student demographics.
longDesc: A Power BI dashboard presenting findings from a youth agency study conducted in partnership with an international education institution. Covers 100 randomly selected schools, tracking enumerator progress, school visits vs. targets, student demographics, and randomization breakdowns.

title: Campaign Tracker
desc: Multi-channel campaign performance: ROI, conversion rates, cost per lead, and channel attribution.
longDesc: Integrated marketing analytics combining digital ad platforms, social media, email, and CRM data. Features channel attribution modeling, funnel conversion analysis, and campaign ROI scorecard.
